description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy resembling a stylized animal, possibly a dog or bear, with a reddish-brown body and tan accents on the head and belly. The toy features large, round, white eyes with black pupils, giving it a wide-eyed, slightly startled expression. Decorative purple flowers are attached to its head, neck, and chest, adding a playful and whimsical touch. The limbs are rounded and soft, with visible stitched seams and some patch-like markings, suggesting a hand-sewn or 'voodoo doll' aesthetic. The hands and feet are tipped with small, white, claw-like protrusions. The overall appearance is soft, cuddly, and designed to appeal to children or collectors.
description: A reddish-brown plush toy with tan accents, large round eyes, purple flower decorations, and claw-tipped limbs. It has a whimsical, slightly startled look with visible stitched seams.
description_view_0: Front view shows the toy's wide eyes, tan face and belly, three purple flowers, and claw-tipped limbs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, ear, and the protruding flower on the chest.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals tan head accents, stitched seam details, and the back of the limbs without facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, ear, and side flower.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: stylized brown dog or bear with flowers
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is wide-eyed and slightly startled, with large round eyes and no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a blank, surprised look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms and legs slightly spread, head facing forward.
